summary: Iteration 115 - Refactoring Verification. All 8 features verified: (1) Stripe Identity tests pass (5/6 - 1 skipped due to missing admin account), (2) WebSocket /ws/conditions connects and responds to ping, (3) WebSocket /ws/live connects and responds to ping, (4) WebSocket /ws/earnings/{user_id} exists and works, (5-8) All extracted Map and Gallery components lint clean. Grom signup parent_email validation works correctly.

minor.issue: Test skipped - admin account dpritzker0905@gmail.com not available for testing

critical_code_review_comments: Map components extracted correctly: MapFilterTabs, MapHeader, BoostSelector, RequestProModal - all have proper data-testid attributes
Gallery components extracted correctly: GalleryPricingCard, GalleryFolderCard, GalleryBulkActions, GalleryViewToggle - all have proper data-testid attributes
WebSocket endpoints properly implemented with ping/pong support and room-based connections
Grom signup validation at auth.py lines 110-111 correctly requires parent_email or parent_username
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring verified. Stripe Identity tests pass. All 3 WebSocket endpoints work (/ws/conditions, /ws/live, /ws/earnings/{user_id}). Map components (4) and Gallery components (4) extracted and lint clean. Components not yet integrated into MapPage.js/GalleryPage.js - they were extracted but original pages still work.
